verdicts.reason: The bulk annotator's overlap detection logic is incorrect and fails to identify all true overlaps between CIDR ranges.
verdicts.required_fix: Change the overlap detection condition in `analyzeBulk` from `((b.net32 & a.mask32) >>> 0) === a.net32 || ((a.net32 & b.mask32) >>> 0) === b.net32` to `(a.net32 <= b.broadcast32) && (b.net32 <= a.broadcast32)` to correctly detect any range overlap.

verdicts.reason: The Content Security Policy (CSP) allows 'unsafe-inline' for scripts, which bypasses a fundamental XSS protection and creates a significant attack surface for script injection.
verdicts.required_fix: Remove 'unsafe-inline' from the script-src directive in the CSP. All inline scripts and event handlers must be refactored into external JavaScript files or use CSP nonces/hashes.
verdicts.evidence: <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'none'; connect-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'">

verdicts.reason: The application provides clear flows, good affordances, fast feedback, and excellent keyboard navigation, making it highly usable for first-time users.
The tool provides excellent discoverability through clear headings, descriptive subtitles, example inputs, in-app help texts, tooltips, and a comprehensive keyboard shortcut legend.
This project offers a comprehensive set of IP/CIDR tools that address real, recurring needs for network engineers and system administrators, particularly the bulk annotator for overlap detection.
verdicts.evidence: Network planning, troubleshooting, and inventory management frequently require these calculations and analyses. The bulk overlap detection is a significant time-saver over manual checks or using disparate tools.

verdicts.reason: The live-updating, multi-tool interface with a powerful bulk annotator that detects and highlights overlapping CIDRs offers a distinct and highly useful signature move.
No documented lessons were violated by the deliverable.

objections.reason: The bulk annotator's overlap detection logic is incorrect and fails to identify all true overlaps between CIDR ranges.
objections.required_fix: Change the overlap detection condition in `analyzeBulk` from `((b.net32 & a.mask32) >>> 0) === a.net32 || ((a.net32 & b.mask32) >>> 0) === b.net32` to `(a.net32 <= b.broadcast32) && (b.net32 <= a.broadcast32)` to correctly detect any range overlap.

objections.required_fix: Remove 'unsafe-inline' from the script-src directive in the CSP. All inline scripts and event handlers must be refactored into external JavaScript files or use CSP nonces/hashes.
